'''Tanya''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Tanya system/Legends|Tanya system]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel]] cell known as [[Shimper Ale]] maintained a manor house on Tanya. The planet produced vast harvests of grain and vegetables each year and was an important agricultural producer of the sector.

{{Planet-stub}}
